completed_tasks.name: Phase 03.1 execution — all 4 plans shipped, verified 5/5, committed
Phase 03.1 code review — 0 critical, 2 warning (WR-01 cursor-pointer, WR-02 Deck-not-found flash), 4 info
Reproduction harness set up (e2e/specs/99-repro-second-open.spec.ts) using stubScryfall fixtures
Ran stubbed repro of user flow: create → open → commander (Atraxa) → add card (Sol Ring) → back → reopen. Console clean on second open.

remaining_tasks.name: Get actual console message from user (stubs don't reproduce — bug likely depends on real Scryfall response shape or untested state)
Once message is known: target investigation at the specific warning/error
Clean up scratch files (_repro.mjs, 99-repro-second-open.spec.ts) OR promote spec to proper regression test

blockers.description: Stubbed repro cannot reproduce — need actual console output from user's live browser
blockers.workaround: User pastes console text, or reruns with a copy-friendly devtools snippet

human_actions_pending.action: Share console message(s) seen during second-open — exact text, type (error/warning/info/log)
human_actions_pending.context: Stubbed flow produced clean console, so bug depends on real data or state the fixtures don't simulate

decisions.decision: Wrote spec as Playwright test (not raw node script) using project's stubScryfall + commanderFlows + deckBuildingFlows helpers
decisions.rationale: Matches existing e2e patterns; if bug is reproducible, spec can be promoted to regression coverage directly

decisions.decision: Did NOT try real Scryfall yet
decisions.rationale: Would hit live network and rate limits; better to target once the symptom is known

next_action: Ask user for exact console message. If they have it → target investigation at that symptom. If not → walk through live browser with them to capture it.
context_notes: Phase 03.1 shipped cleanly. User reported bug immediately after. Stubbed repro of their exact flow (create→open→commander→add→back→reopen) came back clean — no errors, warnings, or unexpected output on second open. Strong signal that the bug depends on real Scryfall API response shape, a card the fixtures don't cover, or a state transition the stubs don't exercise (e.g., oracle_id resolution, Dexie hydration edge cases). Context warning fired at 80%, user requested handoff before burning more exploring blind variations.
